---
title: "D. Sebastian Heredia"
image: "images/headshot.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
---

<p style="text-align: center; font-size: 1rem; color: gray; margin-top: -2rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  *He/Him*
</p>

<p class="justified-indent"> 
  Hello! My name is Sebastian, and I’m a junior at [Harvey Mudd College](https://www.hmc.edu) studying Engineering with a focus on electrical and embedded systems. 
  I’m interested in building hardware–software systems that sense, process, and interact with the physical world, with applications in robotics 
  and automation. I enjoy working in fast-paced, hands-on environments where I can design, prototype, and iterate on real systems.
</p>

<p class="justified-indent"> 
  Outside of engineering, I explore visual and audio storytelling through photography, sketching, and sound/video editing. These practices strengthen my sense of 
  structure, timing, and attention to detail, which I bring into my engineering work. Whether designing embedded systems or building technical tools, I focus on how components 
  integrate and how the system behaves as a whole—allowing me to prototype efficiently and communicate ideas clearly.
</p>

<div style="height: 15px;"></div>

<h2 style="margin: 0; padding: 0; text-align: left;">Resume - *Spring 2026*</h2>
<a href="documents/Dylan_Sebastian_Heredia_Resume.pdf" target="_blank" style="display:block; text-align:center; margin:0; padding:0px 0;">
  *Open Full Resume in New Tab*
</a>

<div style="text-align: center; padding: 0px 0;">
  <iframe 
    src="documents/Dylan_Sebastian_Heredia_Resume.pdf" 
    style="
      width: 100%;            /* responsive width */
      max-width: 1000px;      /* cap width on desktop */
      height: 600px;         /* adjust as needed */
      border: 1px solid lightgrey;
      border-radius: 15px;
      display: inline-block; /* important for text-align centering */
    ">
  </iframe>
</div>

<div style="height: 5px;"></div>

## Additional Links

<div style="height: 15px;"></div>

::: {.flex-container style="display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: center;"}
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/sebastian-heredia4/" target="_blank">
    <img src="https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/174/174857.png" alt="LinkedIn" style="width:40px; height:40px;">
</a>

<a href="documents/judgingperformance.pdf" target="_blank">
    <button style="padding: 10px 20px; background-color: rgb(71, 71, 62); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer;">
        Judging Performance
    </button>  
</a>

<a href="documents/transcriptkey.pdf" target="_blank">
    <button style="padding: 10px 20px; background-color: rgb(164, 159, 19); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer;">
        Transcript Key
    </button>  
</a>
:::
